---
pagetitle: 文章 | Yueswater Blog
lang: zh-TW
description: "Python、R、LaTeX 教學文章與技術筆記，由 Anthony 撰寫，適合初學者與進階學習者。"
title: 文章
subtitle: 教學文章與技術筆記
search: false
repo-actions: false
listing:
  contents:
  - posts
  - "!index.qmd"
  - "!index-en.qmd"
  - "!posts/**/*-en.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 10
  feed: true
---
